repo.description: A C++/CUDA library to efficiently compute neighborhood information on the GPU for 3D point clouds within a fixed radius.

terms.context_snippet: A C++/CUDA library to efficiently compute neighborhood information on the GPU for 3D point clouds within a fixed radius. Suitable for many applications, e.g. neighborhood search for SPH fluid simulations.

A C++/CUDA library to efficiently compute neighborhood information on the GPU for 3D point clouds within a fixed radius. Suitable for many applications, e.g. neighborhood search for SPH fluid simulations.
